hooks.command: ROOT=/Users/tito/repos/word-ga; echo '=== moon fmt --check ===' && (cd "$ROOT/moonbit" && moon fmt --check 2>&1) && echo '=== moon build ===' && (cd "$ROOT/moonbit" && moon build --target wasm-gc --release 2>&1) && echo '=== moon test ===' && (cd "$ROOT/moonbit" && moon test --target wasm-gc 2>&1)

ROOT=/Users/tito/repos/word-ga; echo '=== fmt:check ===' && (cd "$ROOT" && bun run fmt:check 2>&1 | tail -10) && echo '=== lint ===' && (cd "$ROOT" && bun run lint 2>&1 | tail -10) && echo '=== tsc ===' && (cd "$ROOT" && bunx tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -15) && echo '=== test ===' && (cd "$ROOT" && bun run test -- --run 2>&1 | tail -15)
